query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "foundation protocol: a coordination layer for agentic society" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational survey and canonical reference for the mechanism of "coordination" and "communication" in multi-agent systems, which is the core subject of the user's "Agentic Society" protocol. Even though it does not mention the specific "Foundation Protocol" paper, it provides the essential literature review baseline for the domain of communication-based coordination in agentic societies.
